caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and headphones, is seated in a podcast studio. He wears a gold chain and a watch with a red face on his left wrist. He sits behind a professional microphone on a stand, gesturing with his hands held together in front of him. In the background, a white banner features gold stars and the text "GRIND HUSTLE" repeated vertically. To his right, a screen shows blurred imagery and the text "BOSS TALK 101". A logo in the lower-left corner of each frame reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Across the frames, the man is speaking; he begins by looking slightly to the side with a smile and then turns his head further toward the right while continuing to talk and gesture with his hands.
